title: Investors are now learning a painful lesson: Buying a dip driven by geopolitics isn’t a slam dunk
author: Joseph Adinolfi
fullText: Investors rushed to buy U.S. stocks on Monday after the U.S. and Israeli bombardment of Iran helped inspire a global selloff. That may have been short-sighted.
summary: Investors rushed to buy U.S. stocks on Monday after the U.S. and Israeli bombardment of Iran helped inspire a global selloff. That may have been short-sighted.
